settings.headline: One Bag
settings.description: Empty it lies light against your body. Full it carries everything — without protest, without pulling.

settings.label: Volume
settings.description: Laptop, yoga mat, groceries, beach, paints — whatever the day demands.

settings.label: Strap
settings.description: Wide strap, extremely durable. Worn crossbody, seven kilos feel like nothing.

settings.label: Inner label
settings.description: The turquoise inner label is the only concession to colour. Every bag is numbered by hand.

settings.label: Dimensions
settings.description: Leer liegt sie schlank am Körper. Voll trägt sie bis zu 10 kg ohne zu klagen.

settings.title: Zuuma
settings.copy: Made from 100 % cotton canvas, deep black, built to last. It holds 30 litres and carries up to 10 kg — laptop, yoga mat, groceries, beach essentials, whatever your day demands. Worn crossbody, it distributes the weight so effortlessly that seven kilos feel like nothing.
settings.note: Free shipping · Handmade & numbered · Washable to 30°

settings.items: One Bag Every Day · Handmade in Berlin · 100% Cotton Canvas · 30 Litres · 400 g · Every piece numbered

settings.label: Material
settings.description: Same honest canvas as the bag — built to be worked in.

settings.label: Fit
settings.description: Adjustable neck and long waist ties. Fits tall, short, and every body in between.

settings.label: Detail
settings.description: Numbered, signed, made in Berlin. Same signature as the bag.

settings.title: Zuuma
settings.copy: From kitchen to studio. Heavy canvas, long ties, deep pockets. The apron we wanted for ourselves — handmade in Berlin, numbered like the bag.
settings.note: Limited run · Numbered · Made in Berlin

settings.headline: From film
settings.copy_1: We come from the film industry, where our mentors always taught us that design should serve function — a good idea is recognisable by one simple thing: it works.
settings.quote: Would I carry this bag myself — with maximum standards for function and design?
settings.copy_2: The Zuuma Bag was born from a real frustration. After many tests, we found the balance. One bag for all of it. Minimal by design. Built to last. We speak to everyone and exclude no one.

settings.question: How much can the Zuuma Bag carry?
settings.answer: The bag holds 30 litres and is designed to carry up to 10 kg. The 5 cm wide strap is extremely durable — worn crossbody, 7 kg feels like nothing. Honestly, your body will give out before the bag does.

settings.question: Is it suitable for all body types and heights?
settings.answer: Yes — by design. The strap adjusts to 132 cm and works equally well for people over 1.80 m and those much shorter. The bag sits the same on everyone. That's intentional math, not coincidence.

settings.question: Can I fold it when not in use?
settings.answer: Absolutely. Unlike most tote bags of this size, the Zuuma Bag folds flat and fits inside a handbag or a bicycle basket. It's designed to be part of your everyday — not an obstacle to it.

settings.question: How do I care for the bag?
settings.answer: The screen print is washable up to 30 degrees. We recommend washing inside out on a gentle cycle. The 100% cotton canvas gets better with age — it's built for real life use, not careful handling.

settings.question: Are the prints shipped separately?
settings.answer: Yes. Palm Noir, Nocturnal Garden and the upcoming limited edition are printed and shipped on demand via Prodigi — ensuring the highest print quality and a lower environmental footprint.

settings.question: Will there be more colours or editions?
settings.answer: Yes. We're exploring olive green as the next colour. Future editions may also be tied to specific events or charity collaborations. Each new colour will justify itself — by design, not marketing.
